channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Over grown willow tree, 29th April
item.description:
Trees over grown in the alleyway next to whitemarsh close causing branches to fall into my property whilst my 4 year old son is out playing. Alley way is over grown all the way down with rubbish being dumped down there also

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Whitemarsh Close, Springbank, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The trees are overhanging the path/ road, 29th April
item.description:
Trees are so big now they are overhanging the pathways and roads, they require pruning as causing an obstruction. Along the top end of Symphony Road outside houses 46,44 and 42 plus further down by Verda Place and Beni close.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Symphony Road, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree has come down blocking footpath and part of the road, 29th April
item.description:
Tree has come down blocking path at the top of Leckhampton Common and fallen part way into the road opposite the lay-by car park on Daisybank Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Daisybank Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Tree causing damage/obstruction to pavement or road

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 29th April
item.description:
We are planning to cut back trees and vegetation on our land, and were wondering if the 2 limes tree at the front of our property is booked in to be cut back/trimmed soon. And if not would GCC agree to us doing the work with your permission?
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 29th April
item.description:
Pothole CW 1200x700x40mm Road closure Stats X 1 NSD (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 29th April
item.description:
PERM - job 43119615 - Potholes - Could you raise a perm repair enquiry for the below job as made safe.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 29th April
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 29th April
item.description:
Cw pothole 600x406x70mm Rd closure (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple trees seem unstable and cracking in wind on roadside A40, 29th April
item.description:
Around 10 trees behind our property. I believe it is possibly builders land or highways land. Unsure. We think ash trees. They are very unstable in the wind. Very loud cracks coming from them In The wind and they are right in the A40.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Andoversford Bypass, Andoversford, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Ash Tree located on private land
